title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at FreeCharge - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at FreeCharge - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at FreeCharge are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Madurai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About FreeCharge:
FreeCharge is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FreeCharge!
